Log:
  This port requires adding -fnested-functions to CFLAGS when building
  with base GCC.

  Additionally, replace USE_GCC=any with USES=compiler:nestedfct.

  PR:		236009
  Submitted by:	Piotr Kubaj
  Approved by:	portmgr (tier-2 blanket)
